items.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
items.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，反映头部玩家最新动作。

items.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
items.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. items.title: Disable autoplay and infinite scroll or risk massive fines, EU tells Meta
items.summary: Digital Services Act may force Meta to make big changes on its platforms.

items.title: OpenAI wants its new tool to do your work for you and with you
items.summary: Rebranded Codex promises independent workflows that can run "for hours if needed."
